### Rollback

## Impact

- [ ] No API contract change
- [ ] API contract change documented
- [ ] No frontend behavior change
- [ ] Frontend behavior change documented
- [ ] No deployment/configuration change
- [ ] Deployment/configuration change documented
- [ ] No security or privacy impact

## Guardrails

Confirm that the change preserves, or explain any modification to:

- [ ] fail-closed behavior;
- [ ] Human-in-the-Loop;
- [ ] shadow validation;
- [ ] no automatic account submission;
- [ ] synthetic-data-only public demonstration;
- [ ] Run ID, evidence, and audit traceability.

## Documentation

- [ ] README updated when required
- [ ] Architecture or ADR updated when required
- [ ] MVP scope and limitations updated when required
- [ ] Demo runbook updated when required
- [ ] Security documentation updated when required

## Review notes

Call out any assumptions, known limitations, deferred work, or areas that need special reviewer attention.
